## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [architecture](https://github.com/ToastyToast25/sims4-updater/wiki/Architecture-Overview) (3-layer separation)
- [ ] I have used hex colors only (`#RRGGBB`) — no `rgba()` or named colors
- [ ] I have not introduced any hardcoded file paths or credentials
- [ ] Background work uses `run_async()` / `_enqueue_gui()` — no GUI updates from threads
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new linter warnings
